displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Cleanses hair and scalp for revitalized beautiful hair
• Contains formula with nourishing oil which reduces hair fall due to breakage
• 100% dandruff free and makes hair feels soft and fresh, light and easy to manage
• Powered with HydraZinc technology to keep hair 100% dandruff free

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Directions:
1. Shake before use
2. Wet hair
3. Gently message onto scalp
4. Lather and rinse thoroughly
5. Repeat if desired
• Important: Avoid contact with eyes, if this happens, rinse thoroughly with water
